prerequisites.value: Diehard, Endurance, worshiper of a god of battle

description.value: **Benefit:** When you are disabled, you are not staggered, though performing standard actions still deals 1 point of damage to you. Taking a full-round action deals 2 points of damage to you. Combat Trick Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: You can spend 1 stamina when disabled to take a standard action without losing a hit point.
